TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Namibia u Namibia sa ilabu nu Africa, itiza i 22 00 S, 17 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 824,292 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 823,290 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,002 km2, hamin nu tademaw sa 2,436,469. kakalukan umah sa 47.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 8.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 44%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Windhoek . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa tusa bataan bulad tulu demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Hage Geingob (HakeÔľéKenkepu Śďąś†ľ¬∑ś†ĻŚď•ŚłÉ), 1941 a mihca 8 a bulad 3 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Namibia ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 3 bulad 21 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Namibia ayza sa ci Saara Kuugongelwa , micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihcaan 3 bulad 21 demiad. Namibia naw Sinan Fa-cuo , amisan malecad tu Anke-la (Angola , Zambia mababiyaw, walian, timulan biyaw tu Puoca-na (Botswana atu Na-fai (South Africa , nutipan micapi tu Ta-siyung . lilis nu bayu tanayu' makaala tu cacay a malebut enem (1600) a lasubu a kun-li. hamin nu niyadu'ay a kitidaan nu talakaw cacay a malebut (1000) katukuh cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a lawat. . nutipan mililisay tu batu atu walian nu labu a niyaduan u likennan, amis u enal. anganganan nu sauwac idaw ku Aw-lance sauwac (Orange , Ku'-nene sauwac atu Awka-wan-ke sauwac . 15ÔĹě18šłĖÁīÄ,ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČô, . sabaw tu lima (15) katukuh sabaw walu (18) a seci,Pu-tawya (Portugal ,Ing-kuo (United Kingdom caculalculal sa midebung. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1890) a mihcaan midebung ku De-kuo (Germany . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (1915) a mihcaan, Na-fai (South Africa milihida tu Siye-Kuo misuayaw tu De-kuo (Germany malpacaw, tahekal kuhitay midebung tu Sina Fa-cuo . 1920ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcaan, kanatal lanmung paida'tu Na-fai (South Africa mikuwan tu Sinan Fa-cuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1949) a mihcaan, Na-fai (South Africa mialaw tu Sinan Fa-cuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan sepatay a bulad, Sinan Fa-cuo a tademaw patideng kunuheni misakaput, malingatu mialaw tu binacadan amisiteked masasuada'. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1966) a mihcaan, Lanhe-kuo midui tu kawaw nuheni, alesen nuheni ku Na-fai misuayaway tu Sinan Fa-cuo mamikuwan. cacay a malebut siaw a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan, Lanhe-kuo tahun saansa tu Sinan Fa-cuo a tademaw nabalucuan tu Sinan Fa-cuo misumad tu ngangan u Namibia . 1978ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku walu (1978) a mihcaan , Lanhe-kuo malaheci ku sepatay a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (435) a sasulitan, patideng tu Namibia ami siteked sa. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa(1989) a mihcaan, itini i Lanhe-kuo nikantukan palekal tu cesin ihun atu pisinkiwan nu Cuotun, zncutan maala, sasinkiwan ci Nucew-ma kumaalaay mala Cuotun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan tulu a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad mihapu tu misiteked. tukay ŚüéŚłā Wun-heke' u Nami-yia a sudu, cen-ce, sakaudip, lalangawan, telungan nu sasiwbayan, Nami-yia misatekeday a tukay. Sewaw-kepu-munde - Nami-yia sasinganganay nu hapin a tukay. nutipan micapi tu satabakiay nu Nan-taypin-yung , waliyan micapitu hatidaay nu malebut a Nay-mipu' likenlikenan . masilud ku liklik, bangcal ku pala, sakadihkuwan sa ku demiad, mahida u Europe ku kapah. sasiwbayan, mabawbaw ku kataydaan a midang, u Nami-yia ku tataydaan nu kadihkuwan aaidangan. mibatad tu sudu tu tulu a lasubu pitu (370) a kunli. tademaw han tulu (3) a mang ku pinapina, mala tulu nu cacay ku De-i' Germany a laylay. 1892ŚĻīŚĽļŚłā. . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan tusa (1892) a mihcaan patideng tu tukay. nani debungan nu De-kuo heniay, naw Sinan Fa-cuo nu anganganan a minatu, nikudan satu u Wuo-elwi-sewan ś≤ÉÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁĀ£) kumi kawaway. Walvis dadisapan ś≤ÉÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁĀ£ Nami-yia satabakiay nu sailabuay a minatu, taneng pasaluimeng tu mang dun nu tabakiay a balunga. kitidaan makaala tu cacay a malebut cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1124) a pinfun kunli, tademaw han makaala tu lima (5) a mang ku pina. idaw ku silamalay makayda i Nami-ti atu Na-fai ,u dadan atu liklik lima a kanatal masasuala. sipangangan han tu Uyel disapan , Na-cicuo (Antarctica Benguela (Penke-la śú¨ś†ľśčČ) nusienaway idaw kunipiladay tu silaculay nu munabaway a langaw taamisen katukuh itini,babutingan matatungus, tu mihmihcaan idawtu ku tabakiay a buting, kya kasinganganan. cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku pitu(1487) a mihcaan Putaw-ya pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw ci Diya-se sayaway mkatukuh, nikudan satu malawan nu Ing-kuo atu Na-fai amidebung, palekalan Fai-cuo u angangangan a minatu. 1990 . cacay a malebut siwa alasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan Nami-ti misiteked satu u Na-fai kina midebungay, katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan tulu a balat cacay a demiad kiya panukas i Nami-ti , pakasingangan tu Fai-cuo sakasidatengan tu caaya kaw malimaday sa. Sesriem likenlikenan ŤėáÁĶ≤śĖĮťĽéś≤ôśľ† i kitakit numukasi hena a likenlikenan, Nami-yia nupicidekan a aaidangan. itida i Nay-mipu likenlikenan nu teban, micapi tu Na-na suodu nu Wen-heke' tu lima a lasubu a kun-li. masabuyuay nu liken yadah ku mukin. mapacilal satu sumanah saan, singangan sa "sumanahay a liken" alahican sinanum, mulangaway sa u caay katalaw tu kedalay nu likenlikenan a langaw, sawsawni idaw ku sidi, zu, katalan atu tula a tahekal. itini nu kitakitan satalakaway a masabuyu'ay a liken, makaalatu talakaw han tulu a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw kulima (325) a lawad. sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (45) a banggu nu masabuyu'ay a liken silaad tu sacumud nu aaidangan sepat a bataan idaw kulima (45) a kunli ku sasinganganan, tada bangcal tu ku taykaku atu bangcalay demiad sisa pangangan han tu kitakitay a bangcalay nu masabuyuay a likenlikenan. "ś≠Ľšļ°Ťį∑" . "kapatayan nu dihep (Dead Vlei ś≠Ľšļ°Ťį∑" u Suse-seli a likenlikenan nu i sasaay a cikacikahan, tataydaan miadih tu katahekalan nu cidal, tahceleman nu cilal atu malebutay nu kilang a ba'tuay nu tataydaan midang, tu mihmihcaan kutuud ku namakaydaay i O-mia miliwkuay atu manamuhay amisasingay nu tayda tayni itini midang. Aytaw-sa kanatal a aidangan ŤČĺś∑ėś≤ôŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí satabakiay nu Fai-cuo , satenesay nu likisi a pahutinan a aadupan, kakitidaan makaala tu 22,000 km2. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu idaw ku pitu (1907) a mihcaan mala dadiputan nu aadupan, nina dadadipudan ahebalahebal ku kitidaan, katukuh tu cacay a malibut siwa lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan makaala tu 100,000 km2, namala nu satabakiay nu kitakit a papahutinan a dadiputan nu aadupan. ilabu idaw ku cacaya a kitidaan makaala tu 500 km2 nu tabakiay isasaay nu cikahcikahan Ay-tawsa enal . kaudadan idaw ku nanum micumud, liklik tu mihcaan idaw ku tulu a lasubu ku maudipay nu Fai-cuo pahutinan a aadupan, malamel tu kainaian tu nu lumeniay a katalan atu lumeniay a bihid nu sidi atu Fai-cuo nu zuan. . ilabu kapulungan nu ayam han makaala tu tilu a lasubu sepat a bataan ku pinapina a aayaman. nina niyadu u Na-Fai-cuo a Huole-ayam nu kadabuan pisawawaan a kitidaan. tumihcaan kaudadan sa, pina nu magan a Huole-ayam taynitini madabu mulecuh. tayniay midang taneng makadideng micumud miadih tu aadupan.

tu bar~…ĺuŇča a tad…ômaw ¶i dija-s…ô sajawaj mkatukuńß, nikudan satu mar~…ĺawan nu iŇč-kuo atu na-fai amid…ôbuŇč, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan fai- ¶uo u aŇčaŇčaŇčan a minatu. **** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan, nami-jia nupi ¶id…ôkan a aaidaŇčan. itida i naj-mipu r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan nu t…ôban, mi ¶api tu na-na suodu nu w…ôn-ńß…ôk…ô Ē~ ° tu r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu a kun-r~…ĺi. masabujuaj nu r~…ĺik…ôn jadańß ku mukin. mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ satu sumanańß saan, siŇčaŇčan sa "sumanańßaj a r~…ĺik…ôn" ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sinanum, mur~…ĺaŇčawaj sa u ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu k…ôdar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan a r~…ĺaŇčaw, sawsawni idaw ku sidi, zu, katar~…ĺan atu tur~…ĺa a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. itini nu kitakitan satar~…ĺakawaj a masabuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn, makaar~…ĺatu tar~…ĺakaw ńßan tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw kur~…ĺima (***) a r~…ĺawad. s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (**) a baŇčgu nu masabuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn sir~…ĺaad tu sa ¶umud nu aaidaŇčan s…ôpat a bataan idaw kur~…ĺima (**) a kunr~…ĺi ku sasiŇčaŇčanan, tada baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ku tajkaku atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj d…ômiad sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kitakitaj a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu masabujuaj a r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan. "***" . "kapatajan nu dińß…ôp (d…ôad *r~…ĺ…ôi ***" u sus…ô-s…ôr~…ĺi a r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan nu i sasaaj a ¶ika ¶ikańßan, tatajdaan miadińß tu katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶idar~…ĺ, tańß ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu mar~…ĺ…ôbutaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a ba Ē~ °tuaj nu tatajdaan midaŇč, tu mińßmińß ¶aan kutuud ku namakajdaaj i o-mia mir~…ĺiwkuaj atu manamuńßaj amisasiŇčaj nu tajda tajni itini midaŇč. ajtaw-sa kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan ******* satabakiaj nu fai- ¶uo , sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisi a pańßutinan a aadupan, kakitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu **,*** km*. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku pitu (****) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa dadiputan nu aadupan, nina dadadipudan ańß…ôbar~…ĺańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku kitidaan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺibut siwa r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** km*, namar~…ĺa nu satabakiaj nu kitakit a papańßutinan a dadiputan nu aadupan. ir~…ĺabu idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a kitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu *** km* nu tabakiaj isasaaj nu ¶ikańß ¶ikańßan aj-tawsa …ônar~…ĺ . kaudadan idaw ku nanum mi ¶umud, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tu mińß ¶aan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ku maudipaj nu fai- ¶uo pańßutinan a aadupan, mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kainaian tu nu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a katar~…ĺan atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a bińßid nu sidi atu fai- ¶uo nu zuan. . ir~…ĺabu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu ajam ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tir~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan ku pinapina a aajaman. nina nijadu u na-fai- ¶uo a ńßuor~…ĺ…ô-ajam nu kadabuan pisawawaan a kitidaan. tumińß ¶aan kaudadan sa, pina nu magan a ńßuor~…ĺ…ô-ajam tajnitini madabu mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß. tajniaj midaŇč tan…ôŇč makadid…ôŇč mi ¶umud miadińß tu aadupan.
S.FORM: Namibia u Namibia sa ilabu nu Africa, itiza i 22 00 S, 17 00 E, u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 824,292 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 823,290 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 1,002 km2, hamin nu tademaw sa 2,436,469. kakalukan umah sa 47.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 8.80%, zumaay henay umah sa 44%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Windhoek . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa tusa bataan bulad tulu demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Hage Geingob (HakeÔľéKenkepu Śďąś†ľ¬∑ś†ĻŚď•ŚłÉ), 1941 a mihca 8 a bulad 3 a demiad nalecuhan. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Namibia ayza, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 3 bulad 21 demiad. cunli u cunli nu Namibia ayza sa ci Saara Kuugongelwa , micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihcaan 3 bulad 21 demiad. Namibia naw Sinan Fa-cuo , amisan malecad tu Anke-la (Angola , Zambia mababiyaw, walian, timulan biyaw tu Puoca-na (Botswana atu Na-fai (South Africa , nutipan micapi tu Ta-siyung . lilis nu bayu tanayu' makaala tu cacay a malebut enem (1600) a lasubu a kun-li. hamin nu niyadu'ay a kitidaan nu talakaw cacay a malebut (1000) katukuh cacay a malebut lima a lasubu (1500) a lawat. . nutipan mililisay tu batu atu walian nu labu a niyaduan u likennan, amis u enal. anganganan nu sauwac idaw ku Aw-lance sauwac (Orange , Ku'-nene sauwac atu Awka-wan-ke sauwac . 15ÔĹě18šłĖÁīÄ,ŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČô, . sabaw tu lima (15) katukuh sabaw walu (18) a seci,Pu-tawya (Portugal ,Ing-kuo (United Kingdom caculalculal sa midebung. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1890) a mihcaan midebung ku De-kuo (Germany . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku lima (1915) a mihcaan, Na-fai (South Africa milihida tu Siye-Kuo misuayaw tu De-kuo (Germany malpacaw, tahekal kuhitay midebung tu Sina Fa-cuo . 1920ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tusa a bataan (1920) a mihcaan, kanatal lanmung paida'tu Na-fai (South Africa mikuwan tu Sinan Fa-cuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa (1949) a mihcaan, Na-fai (South Africa mialaw tu Sinan Fa-cuo . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan (1960) a mihcaan sepatay a bulad, Sinan Fa-cuo a tademaw patideng kunuheni misakaput, malingatu mialaw tu binacadan amisiteked masasuada'. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (1966) a mihcaan, Lanhe-kuo midui tu kawaw nuheni, alesen nuheni ku Na-fai misuayaway tu Sinan Fa-cuo mamikuwan. cacay a malebut siaw a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu (1968) a mihcaan, Lanhe-kuo tahun saansa tu Sinan Fa-cuo a tademaw nabalucuan tu Sinan Fa-cuo misumad tu ngangan u Namibia . 1978ŚĻī, . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku walu (1978) a mihcaan , Lanhe-kuo malaheci ku sepatay a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku lima (435) a sasulitan, patideng tu Namibia ami siteked sa. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa(1989) a mihcaan, itini i Lanhe-kuo nikantukan palekal tu cesin ihun atu pisinkiwan nu Cuotun, zncutan maala, sasinkiwan ci Nucew-ma kumaalaay mala Cuotun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan tulu a bulat tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad mihapu tu misiteked. tukay ŚüéŚłā Wun-heke' u Nami-yia a sudu, cen-ce, sakaudip, lalangawan, telungan nu sasiwbayan, Nami-yia misatekeday a tukay. Sewaw-kepu-munde - Nami-yia sasinganganay nu hapin a tukay. nutipan micapi tu satabakiay nu Nan-taypin-yung , waliyan micapitu hatidaay nu malebut a Nay-mipu' likenlikenan . masilud ku liklik, bangcal ku pala, sakadihkuwan sa ku demiad, mahida u Europe ku kapah. sasiwbayan, mabawbaw ku kataydaan a midang, u Nami-yia ku tataydaan nu kadihkuwan aaidangan. mibatad tu sudu tu tulu a lasubu pitu (370) a kunli. tademaw han tulu (3) a mang ku pinapina, mala tulu nu cacay ku De-i' Germany a laylay. 1892ŚĻīŚĽļŚłā. . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan tusa (1892) a mihcaan patideng tu tukay. nani debungan nu De-kuo heniay, naw Sinan Fa-cuo nu anganganan a minatu, nikudan satu u Wuo-elwi-sewan ś≤ÉÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁĀ£) kumi kawaway. Walvis dadisapan ś≤ÉÁąĺÁ∂≠śĖĮÁĀ£ Nami-yia satabakiay nu sailabuay a minatu, taneng pasaluimeng tu mang dun nu tabakiay a balunga. kitidaan makaala tu cacay a malebut cacay a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat (1124) a pinfun kunli, tademaw han makaala tu lima (5) a mang ku pina. idaw ku silamalay makayda i Nami-ti atu Na-fai ,u dadan atu liklik lima a kanatal masasuala. sipangangan han tu Uyel disapan , Na-cicuo (Antarctica Benguela (Penke-la śú¨ś†ľśčČ) nusienaway idaw kunipiladay tu silaculay nu munabaway a langaw taamisen katukuh itini,babutingan matatungus, tu mihmihcaan idawtu ku tabakiay a buting, kya kasinganganan. cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku pitu(1487) a mihcaan Putaw-ya pacunaay tu balunga a tademaw ci Diya-se sayaway mkatukuh, nikudan satu malawan nu Ing-kuo atu Na-fai amidebung, palekalan Fai-cuo u angangangan a minatu. 1990 . cacay a malebut siwa alasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan Nami-ti misiteked satu u Na-fai kina midebungay, katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan tulu a balat cacay a demiad kiya panukas i Nami-ti , pakasingangan tu Fai-cuo sakasidatengan tu caaya kaw malimaday sa. Sesriem likenlikenan ŤėáÁĶ≤śĖĮťĽéś≤ôśľ† i kitakit numukasi hena a likenlikenan, Nami-yia nupicidekan a aaidangan. itida i Nay-mipu likenlikenan nu teban, micapi tu Na-na suodu nu Wen-heke' tu lima a lasubu a kun-li. masabuyuay nu liken yadah ku mukin. mapacilal satu sumanah saan, singangan sa "sumanahay a liken" alahican sinanum, mulangaway sa u caay katalaw tu kedalay nu likenlikenan a langaw, sawsawni idaw ku sidi, zu, katalan atu tula a tahekal. itini nu kitakitan satalakaway a masabuyu'ay a liken, makaalatu talakaw han tulu a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw kulima (325) a lawad. sepat a bataan idaw ku lima (45) a banggu nu masabuyu'ay a liken silaad tu sacumud nu aaidangan sepat a bataan idaw kulima (45) a kunli ku sasinganganan, tada bangcal tu ku taykaku atu bangcalay demiad sisa pangangan han tu kitakitay a bangcalay nu masabuyuay a likenlikenan. "ś≠Ľšļ°Ťį∑" . "kapatayan nu dihep (Dead Vlei ś≠Ľšļ°Ťį∑" u Suse-seli a likenlikenan nu i sasaay a cikacikahan, tataydaan miadih tu katahekalan nu cidal, tahceleman nu cilal atu malebutay nu kilang a ba'tuay nu tataydaan midang, tu mihmihcaan kutuud ku namakaydaay i O-mia miliwkuay atu manamuhay amisasingay nu tayda tayni itini midang. Aytaw-sa kanatal a aidangan ŤČĺś∑ėś≤ôŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí satabakiay nu Fai-cuo , satenesay nu likisi a pahutinan a aadupan, kakitidaan makaala tu 22,000 km2. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu idaw ku pitu (1907) a mihcaan mala dadiputan nu aadupan, nina dadadipudan ahebalahebal ku kitidaan, katukuh tu cacay a malibut siwa lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku enem (1956) a mihcaan makaala tu 100,000 km2, namala nu satabakiay nu kitakit a papahutinan a dadiputan nu aadupan. ilabu idaw ku cacaya a kitidaan makaala tu 500 km2 nu tabakiay isasaay nu cikahcikahan Ay-tawsa enal . kaudadan idaw ku nanum micumud, liklik tu mihcaan idaw ku tulu a lasubu ku maudipay nu Fai-cuo pahutinan a aadupan, malamel tu kainaian tu nu lumeniay a katalan atu lumeniay a bihid nu sidi atu Fai-cuo nu zuan. . ilabu kapulungan nu ayam han makaala tu tilu a lasubu sepat a bataan ku pinapina a aayaman. nina niyadu u Na-Fai-cuo a Huole-ayam nu kadabuan pisawawaan a kitidaan. tumihcaan kaudadan sa, pina nu magan a Huole-ayam taynitini madabu mulecuh. tayniay midang taneng makadideng micumud miadih tu aadupan.

r~…ĺik…ôn jadańß ku mukin. mapa ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ satu sumanańß saan, siŇčaŇčan sa "sumanańßaj a r~…ĺik…ôn" ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sinanum, mur~…ĺaŇčawaj sa u ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu k…ôdar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan a r~…ĺaŇčaw, sawsawni idaw ku sidi, zu, katar~…ĺan atu tur~…ĺa a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ. itini nu kitakitan satar~…ĺakawaj a masabuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn, makaar~…ĺatu tar~…ĺakaw ńßan tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu tusa a bataan idaw kur~…ĺima (***) a r~…ĺawad. s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (**) a baŇčgu nu masabuju Ē~ °aj a r~…ĺik…ôn sir~…ĺaad tu sa ¶umud nu aaidaŇčan s…ôpat a bataan idaw kur~…ĺima (**) a kunr~…ĺi ku sasiŇčaŇčanan, tada baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ku tajkaku atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj d…ômiad sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu kitakitaj a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu masabujuaj a r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan. "***" . "kapatajan nu dińß…ôp (d…ôad *r~…ĺ…ôi ***" u sus…ô-s…ôr~…ĺi a r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan nu i sasaaj a ¶ika ¶ikańßan, tatajdaan miadińß tu katańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶idar~…ĺ, tańß ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ atu mar~…ĺ…ôbutaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a ba Ē~ °tuaj nu tatajdaan midaŇč, tu mińßmińß ¶aan kutuud ku namakajdaaj i o-mia mir~…ĺiwkuaj atu manamuńßaj amisasiŇčaj nu tajda tajni itini midaŇč. ajtaw-sa kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan ******* satabakiaj nu fai- ¶uo , sat…ôn…ôsaj nu r~…ĺikisi a pańßutinan a aadupan, kakitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu **,*** km*. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku pitu (****) a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa dadiputan nu aadupan, nina dadadipudan ańß…ôbar~…ĺańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku kitidaan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺibut siwa r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) a mińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu ***,*** km*, namar~…ĺa nu satabakiaj nu kitakit a papańßutinan a dadiputan nu aadupan. ir~…ĺabu idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a kitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu *** km* nu tabakiaj isasaaj nu ¶ikańß ¶ikańßan aj-tawsa …ônar~…ĺ . kaudadan idaw ku nanum mi ¶umud, r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tu mińß ¶aan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ku maudipaj nu fai- ¶uo pańßutinan a aadupan, mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kainaian tu nu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a katar~…ĺan atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a bińßid nu sidi atu fai- ¶uo nu zuan. . ir~…ĺabu kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu ajam ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tir~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu s…ôpat a bataan ku pinapina a aajaman. nina nijadu u na-fai- ¶uo a ńßuor~…ĺ…ô-ajam nu kadabuan pisawawaan a kitidaan. tumińß ¶aan kaudadan sa, pina nu magan a ńßuor~…ĺ…ô-ajam tajnitini madabu mur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß. tajniaj midaŇč tan…ôŇč makadid…ôŇč mi ¶umud miadińß tu aadupan.
